# Sumba Hills

> A new real estate project by Lawang in Sumba, Indonesia. Details are being finalized; this page collects interest from prospective buyers (name, WhatsApp, email).

## Key facts
- Developer: Lawang (see https://lawangproperties.com)
- Location: Sumba, Indonesia
- Status: details coming soon
- Contact: register interest at https://sumbahill.com/
